name: Emilie-Claire Barlow
description: Let Emilie-Claire Barlow and her stellar band transport you with an evening of songbook classics, rhythmic bossa novas, elegant ballads, and French chanson, re-imagined in her distinctive style. In this new show, she presents some of her favourite pieces from La plus belle saison, her most recent project, a love letter to Qubec and the soundtrack to a new chapter in her life. Emilie-Claire Barlows generosity on stage, combined with the remarkable chemistry she has with her musicians, makes every performance a truly unique and unforgettable experience. This is a perfect opportunity to discover (or rediscover) this exceptional artist, full of charm, humour, sophistication and a voice of unforgettable beauty. Emilie-Claire Barlow is not only an exceptional singer, but also a talented arranger, producer, and band leader. With over 500 million online streams and an impressive discography of 15 albums, she has made a significant imprint on the Canadian music scene, receiving numerous awards including one Flix and two JUNO Awards.
